# Volty v0.1.0 — AI reference
# Modern CSS theme library — typed design tokens, container-scoped theming, zero build step
# All tokens registered via @property with typed syntax — browser-validated, Shadow DOM-inherited.
# Use this file as context when generating Volty components.

================================================================================
TOKENS
================================================================================
All tokens follow the pattern --vt-[group]-[name].
Override any token on :root or any ancestor element (including shadow hosts).
Token overrides cascade into Shadow DOM automatically.

### color
--vt-color-brand                     <color>    initial: oklch(55% 0.2 250)
--vt-color-surface                   <color>    initial: oklch(98% 0 0)
--vt-color-surface-raised            <color>    initial: oklch(96% 0 0)
--vt-color-surface-overlay           <color>    initial: oklch(100% 0 0)
--vt-color-text                      <color>    initial: oklch(15% 0 0)
--vt-color-text-muted                <color>    initial: oklch(45% 0 0)
--vt-color-border                    <color>    initial: oklch(85% 0 0)
--vt-color-brand-text                <color>    initial: white
--vt-color-brand-hover               <color>    initial: oklch(45% 0.2 250)
--vt-color-brand-active              <color>    initial: oklch(38% 0.2 250)
--vt-color-brand-subtle              <color>    initial: oklch(97% 0.03 250)
--vt-color-brand-ring                <color>    initial: oklch(55% 0.2 250 / 40%)
--vt-color-success                   <color>    initial: oklch(55% 0.15 145)
--vt-color-warning                   <color>    initial: oklch(70% 0.18 70)
--vt-color-danger                    <color>    initial: oklch(55% 0.22 25)
--vt-color-info                      <color>    initial: oklch(60% 0.15 240)
--vt-color-success-subtle            <color>    initial: oklch(97% 0.03 145)
--vt-color-warning-subtle            <color>    initial: oklch(97% 0.03 70)
--vt-color-danger-subtle             <color>    initial: oklch(97% 0.03 25)
--vt-color-info-subtle               <color>    initial: oklch(97% 0.03 240)

### spacing
--vt-space-1                         <length>   initial: 4px
--vt-space-2                         <length>   initial: 8px
--vt-space-3                         <length>   initial: 12px
--vt-space-4                         <length>   initial: 16px
--vt-space-5                         <length>   initial: 24px
--vt-space-6                         <length>   initial: 32px
--vt-space-8                         <length>   initial: 48px
--vt-space-10                        <length>   initial: 64px

### radius
--vt-radius-sm                       <length>   initial: 4px
--vt-radius-md                       <length>   initial: 8px
--vt-radius-lg                       <length>   initial: 12px
--vt-radius-xl                       <length>   initial: 16px
--vt-radius-full                     <length>   initial: 9999px

### font-size
--vt-text-xs                         <length>   initial: 12px
--vt-text-sm                         <length>   initial: 14px
--vt-text-base                       <length>   initial: 16px
--vt-text-lg                         <length>   initial: 18px
--vt-text-xl                         <length>   initial: 20px
--vt-text-2xl                        <length>   initial: 24px
--vt-text-3xl                        <length>   initial: 30px
--vt-text-4xl                        <length>   initial: 36px

### duration
--vt-duration-fast                   <time>     initial: 100ms
--vt-duration-base                   <time>     initial: 200ms
--vt-duration-slow                   <time>     initial: 350ms

================================================================================
THEMING
================================================================================
System:  :root uses light-dark() — no attribute needed
Light:   data-theme="light"  on any ancestor
Dark:    data-theme="dark"   on any ancestor
Brand:   data-brand="violet|emerald|rose|amber|cyan"  on any ancestor

Custom brand:
  el.style.setProperty('--vt-color-brand', 'oklch(58% 0.19 142)')

JS API:
  Volty.setTheme('light' | 'dark' | 'system')
  Volty.setBrand('violet' | 'emerald' | 'rose' | 'amber' | 'cyan' | null)
  Volty.toast(message)
  Volty.toast({ title, message, variant, duration, dismissible, progress })
    variant: 'success' | 'warning' | 'danger'   duration: ms, 0=persistent

================================================================================
SHADOW DOM
================================================================================
Tokens cross shadow boundaries via @property inherits:true — zero config needed.
For component classes inside shadow trees:
  const shadow = Volty.createShadow(hostElement);          // attach + adopt
  Volty.adoptStyles(existingShadowRoot);                    // adopt only
  Volty.setTokens(el, { '--vt-color-brand': 'oklch(...)' }) // scoped override

================================================================================
COMPONENTS
================================================================================
## .vt-btn  <button | a>
Button
  modifiers: --sm, --lg, --outline, --ghost, --surface, --danger, --icon
  note: Use aria-disabled instead of disabled for accessible disabled state.

## .vt-card  <div | article>
Surface card
  modifiers: --raised, --interactive
  elements:  __header, __title, __description, __body, __footer

## .vt-badge  <span>
Inline status badge
  modifiers: --success, --warning, --danger, --info, --outline

## .vt-input  <input>
Text input. Wrap in .vt-field for label + hint layout.
  modifiers: --sm, --lg, --error

## .vt-select  <div > select>
Select dropdown wrapper. Native <select> inside .vt-select div.
  modifiers: --sm, --lg, --error

## .vt-switch  <label > input[type=checkbox]>
Toggle switch. CSS-only, no JS needed.

## .vt-alert  <div[role=alert]>
Inline alert banner.
  modifiers: --success, --warning, --danger, --solid
  elements:  __icon, __body, __title, __desc, __dismiss

## .vt-tooltip  <span.vt-tooltip-wrap > *>
Tooltip. Two paths: anchor-positioning (.vt-tooltip) or attribute (data-tooltip).
  note: data-tooltip-placement: top (default) | bottom | left | right

## .vt-modal  <dialog>
Modal dialog. Uses native <dialog> element.
  modifiers: --sm, --lg, --full, --danger
  elements:  __header, __title, __close, __body, __footer
  note: JS: el.showModal() / el.close(). Close on backdrop: modal.addEventListener('click', e => { if (e.target === modal) modal.close() })

## .vt-toast  <div (managed by Volty.toast())>
Toast notification. Created programmatically.
  modifiers: --success, --warning, --danger
  elements:  __icon, __body, __title, __message, __dismiss, __progress
  note: JS: Volty.toast(message) or Volty.toast({ title, message, variant, duration, dismissible, progress }). duration:0 = persistent.

## .vt-field  <div>
Form field layout wrapper. Use with .vt-label, .vt-field-hint, .vt-field-error.
  elements:  .vt-label, .vt-field-hint, .vt-field-error

## .vt-stack  <div | section | *>
Vertical flex column. Children stack top-to-bottom with uniform gap. Default gap: --vt-space-4.
  modifiers: --gap-1, --gap-2, --gap-3, --gap-4, --gap-5, --gap-6, --gap-8, --center, --end
  note: Override gap inline: style="--vt-stack-gap: var(--vt-space-6)"

## .vt-cluster  <div | *>
Horizontal wrapping flex row for inline groups: buttons, tags, breadcrumbs. Default gap: --vt-space-3.
  modifiers: --gap-1, --gap-2, --gap-3, --gap-4, --gap-5, --gap-6, --center, --end, --between
  note: Override gap inline: style="--vt-cluster-gap: var(--vt-space-4)"

## .vt-grid  <div | *>
Responsive auto-fit CSS grid. Columns collapse below --vt-grid-min (default 16rem) with no media queries. Default gap: --vt-space-5.
  modifiers: --cols-2, --cols-3, --cols-4, --gap-1, --gap-2, --gap-3, --gap-4, --gap-5, --gap-6, --gap-8
  note: Override min column width inline: style="--vt-grid-min: 12rem". container-type: inline-size set — child components can use @container queries per cell.

## .vt-container  <div | *>
Centered max-width page wrapper with horizontal padding. Default max-width: 72rem (~1152px).
  modifiers: --sm, --md, --lg, --xl, --full
  note: sm=640px md=896px lg=1280px xl=1536px full=no max-width. Override inline: style="--vt-container-width: 60rem"

================================================================================
RULES FOR AI CODE GENERATION
================================================================================
1. All Volty classes use the .vt- prefix.
2. Token values must match their registered syntax — <color>, <length>, or <time>.
3. Use semantic color tokens (--vt-color-danger, not hardcoded oklch values).
4. Modals use native <dialog> + el.showModal(). Never use div-based modals.
5. Toasts are created with Volty.toast() — never write .vt-toast HTML by hand.
6. Add container-type: inline-size to any parent that should trigger responsive behavior.
7. For form fields: wrap input/select in .vt-field with a .vt-label sibling.
8. All @property tokens have initial-value fallbacks — missing token refs render correctly.
9. Layout primitives (vt-stack, vt-cluster, vt-grid, vt-container) live in volty.utilities — they override component styles when combined.
10. Layout gap always references a --vt-space-N token, never a hardcoded value.
11. vt-grid auto-fit handles responsiveness — avoid --cols-N modifiers unless a fixed count is explicitly required.
